Skill rule update addendum: Patricia corrected the workflow: if csrrcreditedcheck has already live-checked the same order/shop/run and confirms the proposed csrrcredited patch is correct, Codex should apply the exact patch immediately instead of waiting for another approval. Before -> after: PARTIAL_WIN, CLAWBACK_FIRED, WALLET_MATCH_HOLD, RESELL_REFUND_EXPECTED, or terminal cleanup approval-gated/wait -> CROSSCHECK_CONFIRMED_AUTO_PATCH when live wallet/R/R proof, shop context, exact before -> after values, no active dispute/appeal/resell ambiguity/login/shop failure/UNVERIFIED result, and readback are present. Runner status rule changed from approval-gated findings make FINAL_STATUS PARTIAL -> OK_WITH_ACTION_ITEMS when execution completed and only action items remain. Files changed: .agents\skills\csrrcredited\SKILL.md, .agents\skills\csrrcreditedcheck\SKILL.md, .agents\scheduled-codex\prompts\csrrcredited-scheduled.md, tools\csrrcredited_codex_date_runner.py. Evidence: tmp-csrrcredited-skill-update-20260630\csrrcredited-skill-auto-patch-rule-update-2026-06-30.md. Result: OK_RULE_UPDATED_NO_LIVE_PATCHES.   • Top-level board card for the 2026-06-29 post-login rerun trace missing/local pending only -> added.
  • Trace status visibility for Parcel Split, CSRR credited, TikTok R/R audit, FBS, SG gap monitor, and TT parcel claim local files only -> visible on Patricia board.
  • Board entries/summaries/bodies 321/321/321 -> 322/322/322 after this card.
  • Marketplace/customer messages, SiteGiant stock, employee business rows, scheduled runner launches, and Profile 70 stops during this board-log repair 0 -> 0.
Task status trace:
  • ttparcelclaim: PARTIAL. Rerun succeeded after internal API recovered, but seller coverage was incomplete. Kept evidence: 312 records, pending 85, return_status blank 24, webapp patches 0; TT66/Lazada login or verification blockers remained.
  • sg-gap-monitor: PARTIAL. Direct rerun scanned 8/9 shops; Atlusrack scan incomplete; gap 9, new activity 1, active risk 1. Earlier local board commit was not pushed because fetch/lint failed.
  • parcelsplit-contact-crosscheck: PARTIAL_BOARD_ONLY. Operational scope had 2308 rows fetched, 40 in the 7-day window, 0 active unshipped rows, 0 messages/patches. It was board-partial only because board closeout failed then.
  • csrrcredited: FAIL. Rerun started and swept 10/20 shops, then failed the final gate before full coverage. Errors included MasonGym, Adelmar, JagerHelmet, Kinata SG WebSocket timeouts, and profile84 CDP unusable. Findings/patches 0.
  • tiktokrraudit: PARTIAL. Fetched 336 webapp rows; changes 0; crosschecks 32/35 confirmed with 3 discrepancies; same-day TT MY seller-profile coverage evidence incomplete.
  • checkfbsclaims: NOT_DUE. Registered schedule is Tuesday/Friday; 2026-06-29 was Monday, so no FBS run was required.
Other same rerun lanes: profile-login-audit COMPLETE; chataudit PARTIAL_STALLED; parcelclaim-auto PARTIAL_UNFINALIZED; checksbvariation PARTIAL in this rerun trace but later board status was corrected to Completed after Patricia said no pooltable adjustment was needed; shopee-shipping-claim OK_SAFE_SKIP; returnitems-lookup PARTIAL_NOT_RERUN_HERE.
Evidence: full trace tmp-schedule-rerun-20260629\post-login-rerun-full-status-2026-06-29.md; machine JSON tmp-schedule-rerun-20260629\post-login-rerun-full-status-2026-06-29.json; login evidence tmp-schedule-rerun-20260629\profile-login-live-status-2026-06-29.md; audit summary tmp-schedule-rerun-20260629\scheduled-rerun-audit-2026-06-29.md; pending board payload tmp-schedule-rerun-20260629\pending-board-payload-post-login-rerun-2026-06-29.json.
Result: PARTIAL_TRACE_LOGGED_AFTER_BOARD_REPAIR. This card is a board-log repair only; it did not rerun, delete, patch, send, adjust stock, or change any operational row.
Outstanding / what Patricia may have missed: TT66 JagerHelmet, Lazada82, and Lazada83 still needed relog/check in this trace; profile84 needed recovery before full CSRR SG coverage; chataudit cs2-cs5 were incomplete in the post-login rerun; parcelclaim-auto C2291-C2296 needed final readback/report update; ReturnItems external retry artifacts needed closeout review.

Reason: The earlier checks counted entries and open classes but missed orphan fields outside entries. Those orphan fields bypassed .entry-body{display:none}, which matches Patricia's screenshot.
Evidence: user screenshot C:\Users\tessf\OneDrive\Desktop\Screenshot_3.png; probe tmp-board-design-restore-20260629\profile70-live-visible-body-probe-2-2026-06-29.json; structural parser found the CSRR screenshot fields outside any entry before this fix.
Result: Fixed. The leaked CSRR fields were first moved back inside the correct 2026-06-26 csrrcredited - scheduled CS R/R credited verification entry body, then the old row-list text was compacted into archive summaries so Patricia no longer sees those old CSRR headings even after opening the history card. ▶ patricia-layout board collapsed restore 2026-06-29 2026-06-29 MYT & restored collapsed cards & removed emergency compact CSS & board-only fix board-infra Fixed
patricia-layout board collapsed restore 2026-06-29: Fixed
Task: Fix Patricia's board after it opened again but showed a different compact design and expanded every entry body until the page became messy.
Every change before -> after:
  • Entry body default display display:block until js-ready -> display:none by default.
  • Open-card display rule .js-ready .entry.open .entry-body -> .entry.open .entry-body, so cards open only when selected.
  • Emergency compact CSS override present -> removed, restoring the main board spacing and typography rules.
  • Same-date checksbvariation duplicate board cards 2 -> 1.
  • Same-date returnitems duplicate board cards 2 -> 1.
  • Hard-coded open entry classes 1 -> 0, including the old 2026-06-25 emergency repair card.
  • Marketplace, customer message, stock, and employee business-row writes 0 -> 0.
Shop: N/A - Patricia board infrastructure only.
Platform: Patricia board static HTML rendered inside the employee webapp board iframe, profile 70.
Reason for change: The emergency blank-board fallback made every entry body visible until JavaScript completed. In the employee iframe that produced the expanded messy view; the extra compact CSS also changed the look away from the previous main board styling.
Evidence: repair evidence C:\Users\tessf\code\codex-lab\tmp-board-design-restore-20260629\patricia-board-design-restore-20260629.json; board lint run after repair; final visual verification recorded separately after publish.
Result: Board-only HTML repair staged: summaries remain visible, card bodies are collapsed by default, and the emergency compact styling is removed.
Outstanding / what Patricia may have missed: This fix repairs board presentation only. It does not close any operational outstanding item already listed in the folded CheckSBVariation or ReturnItems cards.

▶ shopee-shipping-fee-claim - monthly guard safe skip 2026-06-26 2026-06-26 MYT · day 26 vs claim day 15 · Seller Center/webform not entered · profile 70 active via /browser/active · FINAL_STATUS OK shopee-shipping-claim OK

Brief: Codex ran the scheduled Shopee shipping claim monthly guard for 2026-06-26 MYT. The workflow guard allows live claim work only on day 15, so this day-26 run wrote a safe skip report and did not enter Seller Center claim scraping or the Shopee help webform.

Shop / platform: Shopee MY monthly shipping claim lane across all MY shops, via Seller Center shipping claim workflow and AdsPower profile 70 k1b44nvg.
Every before -> after value: date guard day 26 vs configured day 15 -> SAFE_SKIP_NON_CLAIM_DAY; live Seller Center claim workflow not entered -> not entered; Shopee webform submissions 0 -> 0; order SN scrape 0 -> 0; claim batches built 0 -> 0; stock writes 0 -> 0; marketplace changes 0 -> 0; customer messages 0 -> 0; workflow config mode live -> live unchanged; state.first_run_done true -> true unchanged; state.last_run 2026-06-15T16:30:00+08:00 -> unchanged; expected report absent -> present; raw guard evidence absent -> present; profile cleanup evidence absent -> present.
Reason for change: Scheduled monthly guard fired on a non-claim day. Safety rules required a same-date skip report, raw evidence, Patricia board log, error-log closeout, and no live claim workflow entry.

Allowed phones interpreted: 0186683538 / 60186683538 and 0123881391 / 60123881391. Patricia typed 018668358, but live Seller Center stores 60186683538, so the audit treated 0186683538 as the intended allowed value.

▶ scheduled task audit final recheck 2026-06-26 2026-06-26 11:24 MYT · running jobs exited · several reports still missing scheduled-codex scheduler PARTIAL

Correction / final recheck: The earlier scheduled-task audit card was correct at its readback time, but a later 11:24 MYT recheck showed the previously Running jobs had exited. This card records the final state before closeout.

▶ board cleanup active checkout and CheckSB duplicate repair 2026-06-26 2026-06-26 · active checkout conflict cleared · CheckSB duplicate cards folded · lint/public sync OK board cleanup board-infra Completed

Task: Patricia reported the board still showed the same issue after the employee webapp came back. The active board checkout, private board source, and public mirror were repaired and crosschecked.

Root cause: the active local board checkout was still conflicted at index.html and had not cleanly consumed the morning SA-19905 board commits. Separate same-date CheckSB cards also kept the board source lint-failing.
Before -> after board infrastructure: active index.html conflict markers 3 -> 0; tracked file state UU -> resolved on main; board lint failed with 9 issues -> ok, 286 entries / 2190 divs balanced; private board head missing repair -> a971302cd25fdc639654106f9b47d38fb96fc397; public mirror head missing repair -> 35d4e690cf331623d612ae1c9c8c9c17ee6c0d25.
Before -> after board content: 2026-06-26 CheckSB cards 2 -> 1; 2026-06-25 CheckSB cards 5 -> 1; active conflicted 2026-06-25 chataudit block 2 versions -> current origin/main version; local/private/public title readback for consolidated CheckSB cards missing/stale -> present.
Every operational counter: employee webapp writes 0 -> 0; SiteGiant writes 0 -> 0; marketplace writes 0 -> 0; customer/WhatsApp messages 0 -> 0; board entries folded 7 -> 2; new board cleanup card 0 -> 1.
Evidence: backup tmp-board-repair-20260626\active-index-conflicted-before-20260626.html; repaired HTML tmp-board-repair-20260626\patricia-board-index-repaired-20260626.html; folded-card archive tmp-board-repair-20260626\checksbvariation-folded-cards-20260625-20260626.json; publish summary tmp-board-repair-20260626\publish-summary-20260626.json; error-log closeout in .agents\error-log.md.
Result: completed. The board source now has no active conflict markers, passes lint, contains the 2026-06-26 SA-19905 completion card, and is synced to the public mirror.
Outstanding / what Patricia may have missed: old untracked helper/backup files remain in the board repos and were not deleted. Public GitHub Pages can lag the pushed public mirror commit briefly. CheckSB held/excluded items remain as logged: CWS-3F-GREEN-UPGRADE, RATTAN-LAUNDRY-BASKET-D-WOOD-WHT, CB-GREEN, and reserved-only BASKETBALL-HOOP-45CM.

▶ board-patricia hard fix - blank board repaired, fail-open display, smoother design (25/06) 2026-06-25 MYT · root cause: local active checkout had unresolved conflict markers + duplicate HTML document · profile 70 render verified · lint/mirror guard added board-infra profile70 Fixed

Brief: Patricia reported the board still showed nothing after repeated fixes. The hard fix repaired the active board file, preserved current June 25 cards from the latest main board history, made the entry list fail open when JavaScript breaks, and reduced the visual treatment so the interface is smoother and less fragile.

Date: 2026-06-25 MYT.
Task: Hard fix Patricia activity board blank render and smooth the design.
Every board infrastructure change before -> after:
  • Active local index.html conflict markers 3 -> 0.
  • Full HTML documents inside the active local board file 2 -> 1.
  • Private main board cards from current 2026-06-25 history preserved -> preserved, including tiktokrraudit, shipping-claim guard, sg-gap-monitor, parcelsplit, csrrcredited, parcelclaim-auto, checksbvariation, ttparcelclaim, and returnitems.
  • Entry body CSS hidden even if JS fails -> visible until js-ready, then normal collapsible behavior.
  • Visual treatment animated aurora/heavy glow -> calmer static background, softer panels, 8px entries, steadier hover states.
  • board_lint.py conflict-marker guard absent -> present.
  • sync-mirror.sh lint gate before public copy absent -> present.
  • Profile 70 render evidence not confirmed -> OK_RENDERED.
Shop: N/A - Patricia board infrastructure only.
Platform: Local board HTML, private GitHub board, public board mirror, and AdsPower profile 70 k1b44nvg.
Reason for change: The recurring blank-board issue was caused by structural file damage in the active checkout and by a UI rule that hid all entry bodies before JavaScript completed. This makes future JS/CSS problems show content instead of a blank board and blocks conflict markers during lint/sync.
Evidence: tmp-board-hard-fix-20260625\profile70-board-verify-2026-06-25.json, tmp-board-hard-fix-20260625\profile70-board-verify-2026-06-25.png, and tmp-board-hard-fix-20260625\board-hard-fix-evidence-2026-06-25.json.
Result: fixed. Profile 70 rendered the board with entries visible, no conflict markers, current June 25 entries preserved, and lint/tests passed.
